mapper.select: /** UsptStdrJobStepDao.selectViewList */ select cc.code as job_step_cd , cc.code_nm as job_step_nm , case when usjs.stdr_bsns_cd is null then false else true end as is_checked from cmmt_code cc left outer join uspt_stdr_job_step usjs on usjs.job_step_cd = cc.code and usjs.stdr_bsns_cd = #{stdrBsnsCd} where cc.code_group = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@JS_CODE_GROUP}' and cc.enabled = true order by cc.code_type desc, cc.sort_order
/** UsptStdrJobStepDao.selectList */ select stdr_bsns_cd , job_step_cd from uspt_stdr_job_step where stdr_bsns_cd = #{stdrBsnsCd}
